languages.text: "Вы будете свободны от Последнего Приказа и вместе мы продолжим укреплять могущество фон Валанциусов!"
"You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"
languages.original_text: "Вы будете свободны от Последнего Приказа и вместе мы продолжим укреплять могущество фон Валанциусов!"

traits.locale_text: "You shall be free from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"
"You shall be free from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"
"You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"
"You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"
"You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"

languages.text: “你们将从最后的命令中解脱，我们将一同壮大冯·瓦兰修斯家族的力量！”
languages.original_text: "You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: “你们将从最后的命令中解脱，我们将一同壮大冯·瓦兰修斯家族的力量！”

languages.text: "Son Emir'den azat olacaksınız. Birlikte von Valancius Hanesi'nin gücünü pekiştireceğiz!"
languages.original_text: "You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: "Son Emir'den azat olacaksınız. Birlikte von Valancius Hanesi'nin gücünü pekiştireceğiz!"

languages.text: « Vous serez exemptés de l'Ordre ultime, et ensemble, nous rendrons la maison von Valancius plus puissante que jamais ! »
languages.original_text: "You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous serez exemptés de l'Ordre ultime, et ensemble, nous rendrons la maison von Valancius plus puissante que jamais ! »

languages.text: «¡Serán libres de la última orden y juntos reforzaremos el poder de la casa von Valancius!».
languages.original_text: "You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Serán libres de la última orden y juntos reforzaremos el poder de la casa von Valancius!».

languages.text: "Ich werde Euch vom letzten Befehl entbinden, und gemeinsam werden wir die Macht von Haus von Valancius stärken."
languages.original_text: "You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euch vom letzten Befehl entbinden, und gemeinsam werden wir die Macht von Haus von Valancius stärken."

languages.text: 「貴様らは最後の命令から解放され、共にフォン・ヴァランシウス家の力を強めるのだ！」
languages.original_text: "You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: 「貴様らは最後の命令から解放され、共にフォン・ヴァランシウス家の力を強めるのだ！」
